allow: PowerShell($files = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath "c:\\Users\\Ignacio\\Desktop\\poyect\\Finanzas\\backend"; foreach\($f in $files\){ Write-Output \($f.Name -as [string]\); foreach\($c in $f.Name.ToCharArray\(\)\){ Write-Output \('{0:D5}' -f [int]$c\) } })

PowerShell($out = npx --no-install tsc --noEmit 2>&1; if \($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0\) { Write-Output \("EXIT="+$LASTEXITCODE\); Write-Output "OUT:"; $out | Select-Object -First 80 } else { Write-Output "OK" })
